name: costanoa-data
description: Costanoa Ventures shared meeting knowledge base. Four skills: /granola-sync (incremental Granola → Supabase), /granola-sync-all (full historical backfill), /team-onboard (register a new VC), /costanoa-search (query the shared DB). Anon-key + Email OTP auth; per-user JWT scoped by Row Level Security. No admin keys distributed.
